text:
VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 

Navigation outcome variables the safety HRSN (i.e., NN_CORE_SFTY_RSLVD_SW, NN_CORE_SFTY 
CNCT_CSP_SW, NN_CORE_SFTY_OPTOUT_SW, NN_CORE_SFTY_CNTCT_FAIL_SW, 
NN_CORE_SFTY_CSP_UNAVBL_SW, and NN_CORE_SFTY_OUTCM_UNK_SW) are mutually exclusive.
